versions.version_description: Christmas treat: real intermediate version with rhythm tab and counter-melody / suggestions for playable voicings / well-aligned and complete for convenient auto-scrolling / link to soundcloud demo of the arrangement.
This verision combines a fingerstyle tab for the chorus with chords for the whole song.
Extra chords and plays very well and i believe worthy of publishing to share with others who want to play this classic tune.
This is a Jazz version of this song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Last Christmas, I gave you my heart[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]
But the very next day you gave it away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
This year, to save me from tears[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G7[/ch]
I'll give it to someone special[/tab]

[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Once bitten and twice shy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]
I keep my distance but you still catch my eye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Tell me baby, do you recognise me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]G7[/ch]
Well, it's been a year, it doesn't surprise me.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
"Merry Christmas!", I wrapped it up and sent it[/tab]
(whispered)
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
With a note saying "I Love You" I meant it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Now I know what a fool I've been[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
But if you kissed me now I know you'd fool me again[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Last Christmas, I gave you my heart[/tab]

But the very next day you gave it away[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I'm hiding from you and your soul of ice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
My God, I thought you were someone to rely on[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Me? I guess I was a shoulder to cry on[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
A face on a lover with a fire in his heart[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]Dm[/ch]
A man undercover but you tore him apart[/tab]
                        (To - ore me apa - art)
Oooh oooh
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Now I've found a real love you'll never fool me again[/tab]
